primary_motivations: Maximize ROI without high ad spend
demographic_profile.summary: Tech-savvy B2B marketing professionals and solopreneurs who prioritize organic growth strategies over traditional paid advertising. They are efficiency-focused, budget-conscious, and seek to scale their businesses through authentic community engagement and marketing automation. Their primary frustration is the high cost and decreasing effectiveness of traditional advertising, driving them to seek innovative, relationship-based marketing approaches on platforms like Reddit and Twitter.
